electroacoustic.frequency_range_hz: 43 Hz - 20 kHz ([X8i_40] preset, -10 dB); 67 Hz - 20 kHz ([X8i] preset, -10 dB)
electroacoustic.max_spl_note: 129 dB with [X8i] preset; 123 dB with [X8i_40] preset. Peak level at 1 m, free field, pink noise crest factor 4. Reduced max SPL when driven by LA2Xi.
electroacoustic.directivity: 90 degrees axisymmetric (conical, -6 dB), free of secondary lobes across the band
electroacoustic.components: 2-way passive coaxial: 1x 8" LF transducer with 1x 1.5" neodymium HF compression driver mounted coaxially; bass-reflex acoustical load (L-Vents)

operating_modes: Passive (single amp channel per enclosure; HF/LF crossover handled internally)
amplification.preset_note: [X8i] = higher SPL / vocal or sub-paired use; [X8i_40] = extended low end for full-range standalone; [X8i_MO] = stage monitor reference response (59 Hz - 20 kHz). A low-latency monitor variant cuts latency from 3.84 ms to ~1.18 ms (LA7.16i) / ~0.84 ms (LA2Xi/LA4X/LA12X). SB10_*, SYVA SUB_*, KS21_* are subwoofer-pairing presets routed to the SB section.

connection.input_connector: 1x 4-point terminal block with push-in connection and connector sealing plate (internal pinout for L-Acoustics 2-way passive enclosures); IN/LINK marked
connection.breakouts: Optional SPCON adapter: 2-point speakON to bare-wire (2.5 mm2, ferruled) that replaces the sealing plate. SPCON is incompatible with X8i-onCW, WALLx2, PANx2, GROUND, GROUND35 and GROUND55 accessories.

physical.dimensions_mm: 480 H x 240 W x 217-222 D (front face 217 mm, rear/overall depth 222 mm); 18.9 x 9.4 x 8.5-8.7 in
physical.protection_rating: IP55 (only when mounted vertically with the connector at the top)
physical.cabinet: Premium-grade Baltic birch and beech plywood; steel front grill with anti-corrosion coating
physical.finish: Dark grey brown Pantone 426C, Pure white RAL 9010, or custom RAL on special order

modes: Stage monitor (35 degrees / 55 degrees wedge angles)
deployment.rigging_inserts: 8x M6 inserts on the rear of the enclosure; one insert reserved for secondary safety on flown/wall/ceiling installs. Rotatable grill logo for any orientation.

usage: Compact 8" coaxial point source for short-throw install work - vocal/speech reinforcement, fills and complement to larger systems in performing-arts venues, houses of worship, corporate spaces, theaters, clubs and high-end residential/yacht installs.
Strictly passive: budget one amp channel per box, so a single LA4X handles up to 8 enclosures, an LA12X up to 12, and an LA7.16i up to 16 (LA2Xi: 8 in single-ended, only 2 in bridged).
Choose the preset to the job - [X8i_40] for standalone full-range coverage down to 43 Hz, or [X8i] for maximum 129 dB SPL when running hot or paired with a sub.

When low-end extension is needed, pair with SB10i(r), Syva Sub or KS21(i); use coupled presets (100 Hz) for the tightest blend or separated presets (60 Hz) when the sub sits apart - mind the differing headroom (4 dB with SB10i(r), 8 dB with Syva Sub/KS21(i)).
Doubles as a stage wedge via the [X8i_MO] preset and the 35/55-degree monitor angles; a low-latency variant is available, and LFC in LA Network Manager compensates coupling between paired monitors.

Rated IP55 for indoor/outdoor use, but only when mounted vertically with the connector at the top - keep placeholder screws in unused M6 inserts to avoid acoustic leaks, and reserve one insert for secondary safety on any suspended deployment.
